p.em: Intel Manual Quality Specification - Memory Alignment & Thread Safety

ol.li: Memory Alignment: Main controller is 128B (2 cache lines). Mutex is placed at the end to prevent false sharing with frequently accessed counters.
Atomic Invariants: allocated count must be updated atomically or under the pool mutex to remain consistent with the bitmap state.
Registry: Chunks are stored in a linked list for easy expansion; however, allocated_map is a contiguous array for cache-friendly bit-scanning.
Bitmap Search: Implementation uses __builtin_ctzl for hardware-accelerated free block discovery.
